## Description

Clearly describe the feature or enhancement you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this feature important? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How would you like this to work? Describe the desired behavior.

- [ ] Data Acquisition (2)
- [ ] Data Normalization Engine (3)
- [ ] Relationship Graph Engine (4)
- [ ] Liquidity Attribution Engine (5)
- [ ] Snapshot & Historical Data Engine (6)
- [ ] Analytics & Calculation Engine (7)
- [ ] Public API Layer (8)
- [ ] Frontend Application (9)
- [ ] Observability & Operations (10)
- [ ] Testing, Validation & Production Hardening (11)

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

## Additional Context

Add mockups, references, or other context that might help.
